chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

text: 2379 - رَوَى اِبْنُ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «لاَ يُذْبَحُ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ إِلاَّ اَلْإِبِلُ وَ اَلْبَقَرُ وَ اَلْغَنَمُ وَ اَلدَّجَاجُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2379 - Ibn Muskan narrated from Abu Basir, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is not permissible to slaughter in the Haram except for camels, cows, sheep, and chickens."
